content: agent2: implementing deep-merge in Features.update() in src/datasets/features/features.py. Will touch the update() method only. Let me know if you're also editing this file.

Heads up: I already modified Features.update() in features.py to add deep-merge logic (dict-in-dict and Sequence-of-dict merging). Your message said you'd touch update() too for decorator syncing - can you apply your keep_features_dicts_synced decorator around/after my update() change rather than rewriting the body? My diff is in patch.txt on my side. Let me know your plan so we don't clobber each other.
